film-television-starter.opentdb.f7717cc6.prompt: What fictional paper company employs the central characters in the U.S. sitcom The Office?
film-television-starter.opentdb.f7717cc6.explanation: Dunder Mifflin is the fictional paper company at the center of the U.S. version of The Office.
film-television-starter.opentdb.f7717cc6.details: Most of the series follows employees at Dunder Mifflin's Scranton, Pennsylvania, branch. The workplace setting supports the show's mockumentary style and many of its recurring conflicts and jokes.

trivia-101.opentdb.09317bf1d975f72b.prompt: Which board game includes properties named Boardwalk and Park Place?
trivia-101.opentdb.09317bf1d975f72b.explanation: Boardwalk and Park Place are the two highest-priced properties on a standard U.S. Monopoly board.
trivia-101.opentdb.09317bf1d975f72b.details: The familiar U.S. edition draws many of its property names from Atlantic City, New Jersey. Players buy and develop properties while trying to bankrupt their opponents.
